appointment.description: ID of the appointment to which the amendment applies, if any. If present, the `amendment_file` will be appended to the clinical note for this appointment.
appointment.title: Appointment

doctor.description: ID of the doctor who owns the amendment
doctor.title: Doctor

amendment_file.description: A PDF file containing the amended information for the patient's record
amendment_file.title: Amendment file

patient.description: ID of the patient to whom the amendment applies
patient.title: Patient
